title: Build Your 2025 Dreamforce Agenda
author: Shanta Speller

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Dreamforce 2025is right around the corner. For our 23rd year,Trailblazersfrom across the globe will come together at Moscone Center in San Francisco to learn, connect, have fun, and give back. With more than1,500 sessions, workshops, and hands-on trainings, you’ll discover the latest innovations, meet directly with product experts, and get inspired by the moments where customer success comes to life. And because this is Dreamforce, expect plenty of surprises and unforgettable experiences along the way. Join us October 14–16 in San Francisco. If you can’t be there in person, watch the biggest moments live during our 72-hour live broadcast or stream it on demand for free onSalesforce+. If you’re already registered, now’s the perfect time to start building your agenda.

existing_ctas.heading: Plan your Dreamforce experience today
existing_ctas.body: With more than 1,500 sessions over three days, maximize your time by creating a schedule that suits your needs.

raw_html:
Dreamforce 2025 is right around the corner. For our 23rd year, Trailblazers from across the globe will come together at Moscone Center in San Francisco to learn, connect, have fun, and give back. 

With more than 1,500 sessions, workshops, and hands-on trainings, you’ll discover the latest innovations, meet directly with product experts, and get inspired by the moments where customer success comes to life. And because this is Dreamforce, expect plenty of surprises and unforgettable experiences along the way.

Join us October 14–16 in San Francisco. If you can’t be there in person, watch the biggest moments live during our 72-hour live broadcast or stream it on demand for free on Salesforce+. If you’re already registered, now’s the perfect time to start building your agenda.

Here’s how to start building your agenda

1. Log in to Agenda Builder

Agenda Builder is your one-stop shop for all things Dreamforce. Build a schedule for three unforgettable days filled with:

  • Hands-on trainings 
  • 1-to-1 time with partners, peers, and product experts
  • Sessions that matter the most to you

And don’t forget to leave a little room for the surprises you’ll inevitably stumble on around campus. 

2. View your personalized recommendations

Not sure where to start? Agenda Builder uses AI-powered recommendations to highlight sessions and experiences based on your role, industry, and interests. 

3. Reserve your seat

Use the Salesforce Events mobile app or Attendee Portal to lock in select experiences. You can reserve one session per time slot, and we recommend arriving at least 10 minutes early to secure your spot for:

  • Workshops
  • Hands-on trainings
  • Roundtables
  • Salesforce certification sessions

4. Schedule time with experts and peers

  • Ask the Experts. Book one-on-one time with Salesforce product experts. Get answers, best practices, and personalized guidance to make the most of your .. current products address your toughest questions.
  • Braindates. Join one-on-one or small group conversations with peers. Share expertise, exchange ideas, and solve challenges together.
  • Agentforce Consultations. Get hands-on with an Agentforce expert in a 25-minute 1-to-1 session to build, test, and deploy your own AI agent. You’ll get personalized guidance to build smarter processes, create a scalable architecture, and deploy confidently across your organization.

5. Make time to explore

Dreamforce is where groundbreaking technology, meaningful connections, and unforgettable experiences all come to life. The magic often happens in the moments you didn’t plan for: the people you meet, the activations you stumble into, and the product demos, concerts, and chance encounters you never expected.

Step outside your agenda to:

  • Wander the Campground and see product innovation up close
  • Explore Learning Labs with immersive, hands-on demos
  • Join giving-back activities that extend impact far beyond San Francisco

6. Sync your calendar

Add your agenda directly to your personal calendar so you can keep your Dreamforce week organized and in view.

Get started today

Not registered yet? Register now.
Register now to attend Dreamforce in San Francisco. Can’t join us in person? Stream 72 hours of live broadcast, global takeovers, and 450+ on-demand sessions for free on Salesforce+.

Need a place to begin? Explore inspiring keynotes, expert-led sessions, and unique experiences that will help you shape a week designed around your goals.

Plan your Dreamforce experience today

With more than 1,500 sessions over three days, maximize your time by creating a schedule that suits your needs.

Build your agenda
